nasb.text: And Jesus said, “Who is the one who touched Me?” And while they were all denying it, Peter said, “Master, the people are crowding and pressing in on You.”

esv.text: And Jesus said, “Who was it that touched me?” When all denied it, Peter said, “Master, the crowds surround you and are pressing in on you!”

cnv.text: 耶穌說：“摸我的是誰？”眾人都不承認。彼得說：“主啊，眾人都擁擠著你。”

ccb.text: 耶稣问：“谁摸我？”没有人说摸过祂。 彼得说：“老师，众人都在拥挤你。”

csbs.text: 耶稣说：“谁摸了我？” 大家都否认。彼得就说：“老师，人群正围着拥挤你呢！”
